items.title: Net Zero Strategies in Aerospace and Defense Strategic Intelligence Report 2024: Companies Navigating Changing Regulatory Environments and Seek to Ensure they Contribute to Sustainability
items.author: Researchandmarkets.Com
items.description: This report analyzes the key theme of net zero in the aerospace and defense sector, providing insights into the strategies, challenges, and emissions data of leading companies in the industry as they navigate changing regulatory environments and seek to contribute to sustainability.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article does not provide specific information about Airbus's net zero strategies or performance.
Babcock has reduced its Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 7% and has a target to achieve net zero by 2050, approved by the Science Based Targets Initiative (SBTi).
The article does not provide specific information about BAE Systems's net zero strategies or performance.
